creator: dpd@dpdtech.com
text:
The man page that is being installed durning buildworld, for gssapi(3)
(from lib/libgssapi )  is out of sync with the vendor crypto  version
in crypto/heimdal/lib/gssapi.

There is some important information contained in the crypto version of
gssapi(3) regarding broken_des3_mic and correct_des3_mic compatibility
options that is not contained in the installed version of the man page.
